prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: hero animation source frame sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sheet for hero animation frames to be normalized later.
Subject: same hooded orbwalker hero across eight full-body frames in a 4x2 sheet: idle A, idle B, cast windup, cast release, hurt, guard, victory, defeat kneel.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy character sprite source art, clear silhouette and consistent proportions.
Composition/framing: equal-size cells with centered full-body figure and padding, no clipping.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta background #FF00FF only.
Color palette: dark cloak, leather, antique gold trim, cyan/orange spell accents, but no magenta key color.
Constraints: exact flat #FF00FF background only; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no shadows/glow/particles touching background; no extra panel/frame/matte backdrop; no text; no watermark.
Avoid: no #FF00FF or near-magenta tones anywhere inside the character artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
